seoTitle: Summer Hill vs Summer Island — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Summer Hill and Summer Island. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Summer Hill vs Summer Island: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Summer Hill and Summer Island.
heading: Summer Hill vs Summer Island — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Summer Hill, New South Wales and Summer Island, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Summer Hill has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Summer Island (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Summer Hill or Summer Island safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Summer Hill has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Summer Island scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Summer Hill scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Summer Island scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Summer Hill or Summer Island?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Summer Hill has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
